flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at North Idaho College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.5k vs 3.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at North Idaho College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 2.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Idaho College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at North Idaho College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 (19.4% → 22.7%).
